characters.name: Linda La Hughes
characters.description: Linda La Hughes(bornLinda Hughes 5th December 1957) was the flatmate ofTom Farrell, notable for her unattractive looks and ginger hair. She wasn't very bright and had a large self-opinion.

characters.name: Suze Littlewood
characters.description: Susan "Suze" Littlewoodwas a the wife ofJez Littlewood, who lived in the flat underneathLindaandTom.

characters.name: Tom Farrell
characters.description: Thomas Thessolonius "Tom" Farrell(born 4th February 1970[3]) was a mostly unemployed actor and the flatmate ofLinda La Hughes. He is much younger than Linda. He was extreamely camp, and unaware of his atrocious acting skills. He also had an obsession with ex-Peak PracticestarSimon Shepherd.
